item.title: Servicing the 16-Row John Deere Planter
item.description: Laura Farms services the 16-row John Deere planter, keeping equipment ready for planting season.

media:content.media:title: Servicing the 16-Row John Deere Planter
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms services the 16-row John Deere planter, keeping equipment ready for planting season.

item.title: Mowing the Lawn With 3 Tractors
item.description: Laura Farms takes on lawn mowing with three tractors, showing the kind of hands-on farm work and teamwork that keeps rural life moving.

media:content.media:title: Mowing the Lawn With 3 Tractors
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms takes on lawn mowing with three tractors, showing the kind of hands-on farm work and teamwork that keeps rural life moving.

item.title: Getting the Big Machines Field-Ready
item.description: Laura Farms gets the big machines ready for the field, keeping the work moving and the farm day on track.

media:content.media:title: Getting the Big Machines Field-Ready
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms gets the big machines ready for the field, keeping the work moving and the farm day on track.

item.title: Why Auto-Steer Isn’t Always Helpful
item.description: Laura Farms shows a real farm moment where auto-steer doesn’t always make the job easier.

media:content.media:title: Why Auto-Steer Isn’t Always Helpful
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms shows a real farm moment where auto-steer doesn’t always make the job easier.

item.title: Laura Farms Mows the Lawn Fast
item.description: Laura Farms gets the lawn mowed fast in a simple day on the farm. A quick, relatable look at keeping up with daily chores.

media:content.media:title: Laura Farms Mows the Lawn Fast
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms gets the lawn mowed fast in a simple day on the farm. A quick, relatable look at keeping up with daily chores.

item.title: Installing the Dual Wheel Mounts
item.description: Laura Farms installs the dual wheel mounts, keeping the work moving on the farm with a practical, hands-on approach.

media:content.media:title: Installing the Dual Wheel Mounts
media:content.media:description: Laura Farms installs the dual wheel mounts, keeping the work moving on the farm with a practical, hands-on approach.

item.title: Fast Filling a Deep One-Acre Pond
item.description: A deep one-acre pond filling up fast, capturing a simple farm moment and the steady progress that comes with rural work.

media:content.media:title: Fast Filling a Deep One-Acre Pond
media:content.media:description: A deep one-acre pond filling up fast, capturing a simple farm moment and the steady progress that comes with rural work.

item.title: Tractor Project Day on the Farm
item.description: Spending the day working on a tractor project, keeping farm life moving with hands-on effort and a practical, can-do spirit.

media:content.media:title: Tractor Project Day on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Spending the day working on a tractor project, keeping farm life moving with hands-on effort and a practical, can-do spirit.

item.title: Dumping the Silage Wagon on the Farm
item.description: Showing that dumping the silage wagon takes more than it looks, with hands-on farm work and steady teamwork in the field.

media:content.media:title: Dumping the Silage Wagon on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Showing that dumping the silage wagon takes more than it looks, with hands-on farm work and steady teamwork in the field.

item.title: The Sweatiest Job on the Farm
item.description: A look at one of the toughest, sweatiest jobs on the farm, showing the hard work and determination that keep daily farm life moving.

media:content.media:title: The Sweatiest Job on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A look at one of the toughest, sweatiest jobs on the farm, showing the hard work and determination that keep daily farm life moving.

item.title: Restocking the Tanks for Tomorrow Morning
item.description: Getting the tanks restocked and ready for tomorrow morning’s work. A simple, steady farm task that keeps the day moving.

media:content.media:title: Restocking the Tanks for Tomorrow Morning
media:content.media:description: Getting the tanks restocked and ready for tomorrow morning’s work. A simple, steady farm task that keeps the day moving.
